key.name: H_TAIL_TYPE
key.note: 3=DDFP CW (no sign flip); routes ATC_RAT_YAW PID to SERVO4. US-convention rotor (CCW from above) -> body drifts CCW -> positive yaw error -> positive throttle. H_TAIL_TYPE=4 would clamp positive PID to 0 and leave the body drifting unopposed.

key.name: SCR_ENABLE
key.note: 1=Lua scripting on; rawes.lua is loaded and running after boot

key.name: ARMING_CHECK
key.note: 0=prearm checks disabled; required for Lua arming:arm() to succeed

key.name: BRD_SAFETY_DEFLT
key.note: 0=safety switch disabled; servo outputs are live immediately on boot

key.name: ACRO_TRAINER
key.note: 0=Off (raw rate passthrough); disable auto-leveling -- physical equilibrium is ~65 deg from vertical

tail_pid.name: H_YAW_TRIM
tail_pid.note: feedforward throttle added to I-term output to compensate rotor drag at cruise RPM

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_P
tail_pid.note: yaw rate P gain; scales measured yaw rate error into throttle correction. Tuning starting point -- raise only if response is sluggish on a real disturbance.

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_I
tail_pid.note: yaw rate I gain; disabled while characterizing P alone (one-sided actuator + asymmetric integrator makes I aggressive). After P is settled, re-enable at ~P/10 (~0.0015) to remove steady-state drift.

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_D
tail_pid.note: yaw rate D gain; zero -- D is too noisy on this airframe to be useful

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_IMAX
tail_pid.note: I-term clamp (0-1 throttle scale); must exceed equilibrium throttle ~0.485

tail_pid.name: H_RSC_MODE
tail_pid.note: 1=setpoint mode; CH8 RC channel acts as motor interlock (2000=enabled)

tail_pid.name: H_RSC_RUNUP_TIME
tail_pid.note: seconds ArduPilot waits for motor to reach speed before allowing flight modes

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_MIN
tail_pid.note: minimum PWM sent to GB4008 ESC; 800 us = motor off / ESC armed

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_MAX
tail_pid.note: maximum PWM sent to GB4008 ESC; 2000 us = full throttle

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_TRIM
tail_pid.note: trim PWM = min for DDFP tail; ArduPilot outputs trim when disarmed

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_FUNCTION
tail_pid.note: 0=disabled so ArduPilot does NOT drive SERVO4; Lua mode 2 (yaw) writes SERVO4 directly via set_output_pwm_chan_timeout. AP's ATC_RAT_YAW PID still computes but has no output channel.

setup.name: FRAME_CLASS
setup.note: 6=Traditional Helicopter; required before H_* params appear. setup_pixhawk.py sets this in Phase 1 (needs a reboot before H_* are visible).

setup.name: INITIAL_MODE
setup.note: 1=ACRO; boot directly into ACRO so rawes.lua runs immediately after arm (STABILIZE causes yaw discontinuity at 65 deg tether equilibrium).

setup.name: ATC_RAT_RLL_IMAX
setup.note: roll rate I-term clamp; zero to prevent integrator windup at the orbital body rate (constant rate setpoint -> integrator races without IMAX cap)

setup.name: ATC_RAT_PIT_IMAX
setup.note: pitch rate I-term clamp; zero for the same orbital-rate-windup reason as ATC_RAT_RLL_IMAX

setup.name: H_COL2YAW
setup.note: collective-to-yaw mixer feedforward; zero -- the yaw motor is regulated independently by ATC_RAT_YAW, no static cross-coupling needed

setup.name: FS_THR_ENABLE
setup.note: RC throttle failsafe disabled (no RC transmitter on the bench / tethered rig)

setup.name: FS_GCS_ENABLE
setup.note: GCS heartbeat failsafe disabled (long tether runs can interrupt the radio link)

setup.name: FS_EKF_ACTION
setup.note: EKF failsafe disabled; the tethered attitude and dual-GPS yaw cause innovation spikes that would otherwise trigger unwanted mode changes

setup.name: RPM1_TYPE
setup.note: RPM sensor disabled; PWM ESC has no telemetry. Future: set to 5 with SERVO_BLH_BDMASK=8 after enabling AM32 EDT on the GB4008 ESC.

setup.name: RPM1_MIN
setup.note: RPM sensor minimum -- not used while RPM1_TYPE=0
